raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint about American Expresss handling of a credit card billing dispute. Dispute No. XXXX relates to an XXXX hotel charge for {$1000.00}. The room at XXXX XXXX XXXX had no hot water and near-zero water pressure at check-in on XX/XX/2025, and the front desk confirmed hot water would not return until the next morning. I was on a work trip and checked out within about XXXX hours without using the room. I called Amex immediately ( XXXX XXXX ) and provided evidence. 

Amex reopened the dispute for evidence upload, I uploaded my documentation, and then Amex closed the dispute the next day without any meaningful investigation. I did not receive any written communication explaining the closure or confirming that my uploads were actually reviewed. Amex also previously decided to hold me responsible for XXXX night ( {$270.00} ), which is not acceptable given the undisclosed outage and immediate checkout.

Resolution requested : Full reversal of {$1000.00} and removal of the {$270.00} one-night charge, plus a written explanation identifying what evidence was reviewed and why the case was closed immediately after evidence submission.
